> Professional soft washing and pressure washing company serving Northwest Indiana, North Central Indiana, and Southwest Michigan. Licensed, bonded, and insured. 53 five-star reviews on Google and Facebook. Residential and commercial exterior cleaning.

---

## Residential Services

### House Washing
Professional house washing using a safe soft wash process to remove algae, mold, dirt, and buildup from your home's exterior, restoring its appearance and protecting your property.

### Roof Cleaning
Professional roof cleaning designed to safely remove algae, moss, and organic buildup using a low-pressure soft wash system that protects and extends the life of your roof.

### Driveway & Concrete Cleaning
Professional driveway and concrete cleaning that removes years of dirt, algae, and stains using high-powered surface cleaners, restoring the clean look of your property.

### Concrete Sealing
Concrete sealing service creates a protective barrier that helps prevent staining, moisture penetration, and surface deterioration while enhancing the look of your concrete.

### Decks & Fences
Safe cleaning of wood and vinyl decks and fences, removing years of dirt, algae, and buildup while protecting the surface and restoring its original look.

### Rust Removal
Specialized cleaning solutions designed to break down and remove rust stains from concrete, siding, and other exterior surfaces without causing damage.

### Paver Cleaning, Sanding & Sealing
Professional paver cleaning with joint sand refill and protective sealant application to enhance color, prevent weeds, and protect surfaces from stains and wear.

---

## Commercial Services

Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning provides full-scale commercial exterior cleaning. The company works directly with property managers, HOAs, business owners, and facility managers to maintain professional appearances for commercial properties of all sizes.

### Buildings & Storefronts
Professional building and storefront cleaning designed to remove dirt, stains, and buildup while maintaining a clean, professional appearance for your business.

### Drive-Thrus & High-Traffic Areas
Professional cleaning for drive-through lanes and high-traffic areas, removing grease, stains, and heavy buildup to maintain a clean and welcoming environment.

### Parking Lots & Garages
Professional cleaning for parking lots and garages that removes oil, dirt, and grime while improving the overall appearance and safety of your property.

### Property Management
Works directly with property management companies, HOAs, and businesses to deliver dependable exterior cleaning services and maintain the appearance of their properties on an ongoing basis.

### Schools, Retail Centers & Offices
Professional exterior cleaning services for schools, retail centers, and office buildings, helping maintain clean, safe, and welcoming environments for students, employees, and visitors year-round.

---

## What Sets Under Pressure Apart

1. **Commercial-Grade Equipment, Competitive Pricing** — Professional equipment and solutions without the premium price tag. Most pros with real gear charge more. Most cheap options show up with consumer machines.
2. **Licensed, Bonded & Insured** — Your property is protected. This is a fully insured professional company, not a side hustle with a pickup truck.
3. **Results That Actually Last** — The soft-wash process removes organic growth at the root, not just the surface. Results hold up significantly longer than traditional pressure washing.
4. **Communication You Can Count On** — Clear quotes, timely updates, and reliable scheduling. Customers call this out more than anything else in reviews.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is soft washing and how is it different from pressure washing?
Soft washing uses low-pressure water combined with commercial-grade cleaning solutions to safely remove algae, mold, mildew, and organic growth from surfaces. Unlike traditional pressure washing that relies on high-pressure force, soft washing kills growth at the root without risking damage to siding, roofing, or painted surfaces. The results last significantly longer because the source of the growth is eliminated, not just the surface stain.

### What areas does Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning serve?
Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning serves Northwest Indiana, North Central Indiana, and Southwest Michigan. Popular service cities include Valparaiso, Chesterton, Portage, Michigan City, La Porte, Crown Point, Merrillville, Hobart, Schererville, St. John, Wanatah, and New Buffalo. Contact us at 219-307-1207 to confirm service availability in your area.

### Is Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning licensed and insured?
Yes. Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. Your property is protected throughout the entire cleaning process. We operate as a professional company with commercial-grade equipment, not a side job with consumer machines.

### How much does exterior cleaning cost?
Pricing depends on the size of the area, the type of service needed, and the condition of the surfaces. Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning provides free, detailed estimates with no obligation. Call 219-307-1207 or fill out our online form to request your free estimate.

### What residential services does Under Pressure offer?
Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning offers house washing, roof cleaning, driveway and concrete cleaning, concrete sealing, deck and fence cleaning, rust removal, and paver cleaning with sanding and sealing. All residential services use safe soft-wash techniques that protect your property while delivering long-lasting results.

### Do you offer commercial exterior cleaning services?
Yes. Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning provides full-scale commercial exterior cleaning including building and storefront washing, drive-thru and high-traffic area cleaning, parking lot and garage cleaning, and property management services for schools, HOAs, retail centers, and office buildings. The company works directly with property managers and facility teams to deliver reliable, scheduled cleaning.

### Why does Under Pressure use soft washing instead of high-pressure methods?
Soft washing is safer and more effective for most exterior surfaces. Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning uses soft washing as the primary method for siding, roofing, painted surfaces, and other delicate materials. It combines low-pressure water with commercial-grade cleaning solutions that kill algae, mold, and mildew at the root — not just the surface. The results last significantly longer than high-pressure washing alone, and there is no risk of damage to siding, shingles, or paint. It is the industry-recommended approach and one of the core techniques that sets Under Pressure apart.

### How are reviews and ratings for Under Pressure?
Under Pressure Exterior Cleaning has earned 53 five-star reviews across Google and Facebook. Customers consistently highlight the quality of work, professional communication, fair pricing, and attention to detail. The company maintains a 5.0 star rating and a 100% satisfaction rate.

## Selected Customer Reviews

The team arrived on time, paid great attention to detail, and made sure everything was done perfectly. The quality of their work exceeded my expectations and the finished results look incredible." — Locas L., Google

"Trey and his partner did a great job pressure washing our vinyl siding and decking. They got rid of 35 years of green algae and grime and it looks like new. Trey had great equipment and was efficient and professional. I highly recommend his business and service." — Jim J., Google

"We will definitely be repeat customers. Very professional and fast service. I didn't think some of the staining would come off our white siding, but everything came out including the chimney staining. Very affordable for high quality work." — Christy R., Google

"I was overwhelmed with cleaning up my neglected home after renters moved out. Trey kept me updated every step of the way and the results amazed me. My home and yard look brand new. I will definitely recommend them to anyone who needs work done." — Mary C., Facebook

"Highly recommend. They cleaned my two story house, garage, storage shed, and entire fence. Trey is very professional, quick with service, and very fairly priced. I will definitely use them again." — Theresa M., Facebook
